generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMeasurementControlUnit : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles sensor data collection and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMeasurementControlUnit
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical crane state data stored in TimescaleDB with SQL query capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, ArduinoSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360, PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker for system deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for historical data storage and SQL query capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD model creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CapellaArcadia : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcess
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight, ContinuousValidationAlert
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using Capella and DarTwin notation for digital twin evolution with documented development process and future extensions"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory planning for crane movement"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of simulated trajectory against physical system"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization via time series classification techniques"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts prompting operator actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage for analysis and visualization"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data visualization using Grafana"
]

instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Documented development process and future extensions (custom driver board, virtual commissioning)"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane system"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoisting movement"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the system"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for hoisting movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp port"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMeasurementControlUnit, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application, sent through the Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; measurements and simulations are compared continuously with distance metrics calculated against thresholds, and data is logged in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system integrating physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging app, HMI) and digital components (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) via MQTT communication and Docker deployment on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), manufactured (physical hardware components), and operated (real-time data logging, validation during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against thresholds; model validation methods reused from [5] for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers via proprietary or unspecified protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python gantrylib module installed via pip; deployed on a single personal computer."
]
